history.summary: Adds a guarded two-byte repair and complete three-file rollback for the cross-platform Near Gas Station receipt bug.
Refuses the repair unless Crash, B-RAD, and Scotch each exist exactly once and are already found and reviewed.
Marks the stuck receipt complete but resets B-RAD, allowing the player to recollect B-RAD and trigger the normal 3/4 to 4/4 transition in game.
Also transfers the three-badge completion value to the receipt and clears B-RAD's badges, producing a structurally consistent completed receipt and fully uncollected B-RAD.
